name: OnAREthProcessTxARPDU
title: OnAREthProcessTxARPDU
syntax: long OnAREthProcessTxARPDU(dword sourceAddress, dword sourcePort, dword destinationAddress, dword destinationPort, dword length, char buffer[], dword headerID );
description: This callback is called before the interaction layer wants to send an AUTOSAR PDU. This makes it possible to suppress the transmission.

parameters.name: sourceAddress
parameters.description: IPv4 address of the local application endpoint.

return: The AUTOSAR PDU is sent by the interaction layer, if the callback sends back 1. Otherwise the transmission is suppressed.
